title: MutationSurface
description: Canonical mutation surface classification evidence consumed by the SCO_VALID transition. Produced by classifying SCO_CANDIDATE governed files against the static Mutation Surface Registry.

file_classifications.description: Classification result for each governed file. Each entry binds the file to its highest-risk registry match.

derived_mutation_classes.description: Deduplicated set of mutation classes derived from file_classifications. Must exactly match SCO_CANDIDATE mutation_classes for SCO_VALID.

derived_target_surfaces.description: Deduplicated set of target surfaces derived from file_classifications. Must exactly match SCO_CANDIDATE target_surfaces for SCO_VALID.

derived_risk_class.description: Highest risk class across all file_classifications. SCO_CANDIDATE risk_class must not be lower than this value.

unclassified_files.description: Governed files that matched no registry entry. Any entry here forces GOVERNANCE_UNKNOWN -> SCO_INVALID.
